title: Interactive Assessment
description: An interactive, hands-on assessment with multiple challenges. Assessments are stored in numbered directories within chapter assessments/ folders (e.g., 01-chapter/assessments/01-assessment-name/). The assessment directory must contain assessment.yaml, description.md, and subdirectories for each challenge. The assessment metadata references OCI artifacts (starter tarball and validator image) that implement the runtime behavior.

code.description: Unique identifier for this assessment. Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens.

title.description: Display name for the assessment shown in the UI.

starterImageUri.description: OCI artifact URI for the starter content tarball. This tarball contains files to seed the learner's Git repository (e.g., 'oci://registry/tpa-p2p-starter').

validatorImageUri.description: OCI image URI for the validator service. This long-running container validates learner progress against challenge goals (e.g., 'oci://registry/tpa-p2p-validator').

imageVersion.description: Semantic version tag shared by both starterImageUri and validatorImageUri. Supports full semver 2.0.0 format including pre-release and build metadata (e.g., '0.0.4', '1.0.0-alpha', '1.0.0+build.123').

timeLimit.description: Optional time limit for completing the entire assessment (e.g., '30m', '1h').

video.description: Optional URL to a video resource providing assessment walkthrough or introduction.
